//: Wire prism's enforcement hooks. Copy hooks/*.sh to ~/.claude/hooks/ (or a project .claude/hooks/), then merge this 'hooks' block into your settings.json (~/.claude/settings.json for global, or <repo>/.claude/settings.json for one project). The guard runs before every Bash call and blocks irreversible one-way-door commands unless explicitly approved with a '# PRISM_OK' token.
